---
title: "Does religiosity buffer the negative effect of moving on giving?"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE}
# Research design:
#   - Panel of PSID families (2001-2021, biennial)
#   - Outcome: total charitable giving (sum of donation categories)
#   - Treatment: moved (binary, from "WHY MOVED" reason codes)
#   - Moderator: religious (binary, Religious_Preference != 0/97/98/99)
#   - Model: family fixed effects with moved x religious interaction
#   - Family FE absorbs time-invariant family characteristics
#   - Wave FE absorbs macro trends in giving
#
# NOTE: We keep ALL families including splitoffs and use PSID
# longitudinal family weights (family_weight) to maintain
# representativeness and correct for attrition + splitoff dilution.
# id_1968 tracks the 1968 lineage; family_id is the unit of analysis.

library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(fixest)
library(here)
```

```{r load_and_derive}
# ---- 1. Load the family-level panel ----
panel <- read_parquet(here("output", "psid_family_year_2001_latest.parquet"))

cat("Raw panel:", nrow(panel), "rows,", ncol(panel), "columns\n")
cat("Waves:", paste(sort(unique(panel$wave)), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Unique id_1968 (lineages):", n_distinct(panel$id_1968), "\n\n")

# ---- 2. Derive key variables ----

# 2a. Total giving: sum available dollar-amount donation columns
donation_cols <- c(
  "DOLLAR AMT OF RELIGIOUS DONATIONS",
  "DOLLAR AMT OF NEEDY DONATIONS",
  "DOLLAR AMT OF HEALTH DONATIONS",
  "DOLLAR AMT OF EDUCATION DONATIONS"
)
available_donation_cols <- donation_cols[donation_cols %in% names(panel)]
cat("Donation columns found:", length(available_donation_cols), "\n")
cat("  ", paste(available_donation_cols, collapse = "\n   "), "\n\n")

# 2b. Build analysis dataset
#     Clean PSID sentinel codes from dollar amounts:
#     Religious donations use 6+ digit sentinels (999997+)
#     Needy/Health/Education use 5-digit sentinels (99997+)
nonrelig_cols <- c(
  "DOLLAR AMT OF NEEDY DONATIONS",
  "DOLLAR AMT OF HEALTH DONATIONS",
  "DOLLAR AMT OF EDUCATION DONATIONS"
)
relig_cols <- "DOLLAR AMT OF RELIGIOUS DONATIONS"

analysis <- panel |>
  mutate(
    across(
      any_of(nonrelig_cols),
      ~ if_else(.x >= 99997, NA_real_, .x)
    ),
    across(
      any_of(relig_cols),
      ~ if_else(.x >= 999997, NA_real_, .x)
    )
  ) |>
  mutate(
    # --- Outcome: total giving ---
    total_giving = rowSums(
      across(all_of(available_donation_cols),
             ~ replace_na(pmax(.x, 0), 0)),
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    log_giving = log1p(total_giving),

    # --- Treatment: whether the family moved since last wave ---
    #     "WHY MOVED 1ST" coded 0 = did not move; 1-9 = reason
    #     97/98/99 are sentinel codes (Other/DK/Refused) — treat
    #     as NA because we can't confirm a move actually occurred
    moved = case_when(
      is.na(`WHY MOVED 1ST`) ~ 0L,
      `WHY MOVED 1ST` >= 97 ~ NA_integer_,
      `WHY MOVED 1ST` > 0 ~ 1L,
      TRUE ~ 0L
    ),

    # --- Moderator: religious affiliation ---
    #     PSID codes: 0 = none, 1-13 = denominations,
    #                 97 = other, 98 = DK, 99 = NA/refused
    religious = case_when(
      is.na(Religious_Preference) ~ NA_integer_,
      Religious_Preference %in% c(0, 97, 98, 99) ~ 0L,
      TRUE ~ 1L
    ),

    # --- Controls ---
    age = as.numeric(head_age),
    age2 = age^2,

    # --- Longitudinal family key ---
    # family_id is recycled across waves (useless for tracking).
    # Construct a composite key: id_1968 + head birth year + sex
    # to uniquely identify the same family across waves.
    birth_year = wave - age,
    family_key = paste(id_1968, birth_year, head_sex, sep = "_")
  ) |>
  select(
    id_1968, family_id, family_key, wave, interview_year,
    family_weight,
    total_giving, log_giving,
    moved, religious,
    Religious_Preference,
    age, age2,
    `Current State`,
    any_of("n_children_u18")
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(id_1968), !is.na(religious),
         !is.na(family_weight), family_weight > 0)

# Deduplicate: if two families share the same key in a wave
# (e.g., same-sex twins from same lineage), keep oldest head
n_pre <- nrow(analysis)
analysis <- analysis |>
  group_by(family_key, wave) |>
  slice_max(age, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  ungroup()
cat("After dedup:", nrow(analysis), "of", n_pre,
    "rows (dropped", n_pre - nrow(analysis), ")\n")

# --- Lagged religiosity (pre-move moderator) ---
# family_key uniquely tracks a family across waves
analysis <- analysis |>
  arrange(family_key, wave) |>
  group_by(family_key) |>
  mutate(religious_lag = lag(religious, order_by = wave)) |>
  ungroup()

cat("\nAnalysis dataset:", nrow(analysis),
    "family-wave observations\n")
cat("Unique family_key:", n_distinct(analysis$family_key), "\n")
cat("Unique id_1968 lineages:",
    n_distinct(analysis$id_1968), "\n")
cat("Movers:", sum(analysis$moved == 1, na.rm = TRUE), "(",
    round(100 * mean(analysis$moved == 1, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    "%)\n")
cat("Religious:", sum(analysis$religious == 1), "(",
    round(100 * mean(analysis$religious == 1), 1), "%)\n")
cat("Religious (lagged, non-NA):",
    sum(!is.na(analysis$religious_lag)), "\n\n")
```

```{r descriptives}
# ---- 3. Descriptive statistics (weighted) ----
# Using LAGGED religiosity (pre-move status)
desc_table <- analysis |>
  filter(!is.na(religious_lag), !is.na(moved)) |>
  group_by(moved, religious_lag) |>
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    wt_mean_giving = weighted.mean(total_giving, family_weight, na.rm = TRUE),
    wt_mean_log    = weighted.mean(log_giving, family_weight, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("Weighted mean giving by move status x PRE-MOVE religiosity:\n")
print(desc_table)
```

```{r models}
# ---- 4. Fixed effects regression (weighted) ----
# family_key FE absorbs time-invariant family characteristics
# (composite key: id_1968 + head birth year + sex)
# wave FE absorbs macro trends in giving
# Weights = PSID longitudinal family weights
# religious_lag = religiosity from the PRIOR wave (pre-move)
#   — avoids endogeneity from moving changing religious ID

# Subset with non-missing lagged religiosity
analysis_lag <- analysis |>
  filter(!is.na(religious_lag), !is.na(moved))

cat("Lagged-religion sample:", nrow(analysis_lag),
    "obs (first wave of each family dropped)\n\n")

# Model 1: Does moving reduce giving?
m1 <- feols(log_giving ~ moved | family_key + wave,
            data = analysis_lag,
            weights = ~family_weight)

# Model 2: Does PRE-MOVE religiosity moderate the effect?
m2 <- feols(
  log_giving ~ moved * religious_lag | family_key + wave,
  data = analysis_lag,
  weights = ~family_weight
)

# Model 3: Add age controls
m3 <- feols(
  log_giving ~ moved * religious_lag + age + age2 |
    family_key + wave,
  data = analysis_lag,
  weights = ~family_weight
)

# Cluster standard errors by family
etable(m1, m2, m3,
       headers = c("Baseline", "Interaction", "Controls"),
       vcov = "cluster",
       se.below = TRUE)
```

```{r interpretation}
# ---- 5. Interpretation ----
cat("\n=== KEY COEFFICIENTS (Model 2) ===\n")
coefs <- coef(m2)
cat("moved:               ",
    round(coefs["moved"], 4),
    " -- effect of moving (pre-move non-religious)\n")
cat("religious_lag:        ",
    round(coefs["religious_lag"], 4),
    " -- within-family effect of being religious\n")
cat("moved:religious_lag:  ",
    round(coefs["moved:religious_lag"], 4),
    " -- DIFFERENTIAL effect for pre-move religious\n")
cat("\nPositive interaction = religious people's",
    "giving decreases LESS after moving.\n")
cat("Negative interaction = religious people's",
    "giving decreases MORE after moving.\n")
```

```{r plot_setup}
PLOT_DIR <- here("plots")
if (!dir.exists(PLOT_DIR)) dir.create(PLOT_DIR, recursive = TRUE)
```

```{r plot_descriptive, fig.width=7, fig.height=5}
# ---- 6. Descriptive bar chart: weighted mean giving by moved x religiosity ----
desc_plot <- analysis |>
  filter(!is.na(religious_lag), !is.na(moved)) |>
  mutate(
    Moved     = factor(moved, levels = c(0, 1),
                       labels = c("Did not move", "Moved")),
    Religious = factor(religious_lag, levels = c(0, 1),
                       labels = c("Not religious (prior wave)",
                                  "Religious (prior wave)"))
  ) |>
  group_by(Moved, Religious) |>
  summarise(
    mean_giving = weighted.mean(total_giving, family_weight, na.rm = TRUE),
    n           = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(desc_plot, aes(x = Moved, y = mean_giving, fill = Religious)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0("n=", scales::comma(n))),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.7),
    vjust = -0.5, size = 3
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#7f8c8d", "#2980b9")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::dollar_format()) +
  labs(
    title    = "Weighted Mean Giving by Move Status and Pre-Move Religiosity",
    subtitle = "PSID 2003-2021 (weighted, lagged religiosity sample)",
    x = NULL, y = "Weighted mean total giving ($)",
    fill = NULL
  ) 
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

ggsave(file.path(PLOT_DIR, "descriptive_giving_by_group.png"),
       width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r plot_descriptive_by_year, fig.width=14, fig.height=10}
# ---- 6b. Weighted descriptive bar chart by year ----
desc_by_year <- analysis |>
  filter(!is.na(religious_lag), !is.na(moved), wave >= 2003) |>
  mutate(
    Moved     = factor(moved, levels = c(0, 1),
                       labels = c("Did not move", "Moved")),
    Religious = factor(religious_lag, levels = c(0, 1),
                       labels = c("Not religious", "Religious"))
  ) |>
  group_by(wave, Moved, Religious) |>
  summarise(
    mean_giving = weighted.mean(total_giving, family_weight,
                                na.rm = TRUE),
    n           = n(),
    .groups     = "drop"
  )

ggplot(desc_by_year,
       aes(x = Moved, y = mean_giving, fill = Religious)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0("n=", scales::comma(n))),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.7),
    vjust = -0.5, size = 2.5
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ wave, nrow = 2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#7f8c8d", "#2980b9")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::dollar_format()) +
  labs(
    title    = "Weighted Mean Giving by Move Status & Religiosity",
    subtitle = "PSID, by wave (weighted, lagged religiosity)",
    x = NULL, y = "Weighted mean total giving ($)",
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold")
  )

ggsave(file.path(PLOT_DIR, "descriptive_giving_by_group_year.png"),
       width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```

```{r plot_event_time, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
# ---- 6c. Event-time plot around the first observed move ----
# For a cleaner descriptive event window, focus on families with exactly
# one observed move and at least one pre- and post-move wave. Each
# family's giving is indexed to the prior wave (t = -2).
first_move_families <- analysis |>
  filter(!is.na(religious_lag), !is.na(moved)) |>
  group_by(family_key) |>
  summarise(
    move_count = sum(moved == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    first_move_wave = ifelse(
      any(moved == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
      min(wave[moved == 1], na.rm = TRUE),
      NA_real_
    ),
    pre_obs = sum(wave < first_move_wave, na.rm = TRUE),
    post_obs = sum(wave > first_move_wave, na.rm = TRUE),
    pre_move_religious = religious_lag[match(first_move_wave, wave)],
    baseline_log_giving = log_giving[match(first_move_wave - 2, wave)],
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  filter(
    move_count == 1,
    pre_obs >= 1,
    post_obs >= 1,
    !is.na(pre_move_religious),
    !is.na(baseline_log_giving)
  )

event_sample <- analysis |>
  filter(!is.na(religious_lag), !is.na(moved)) |>
  inner_join(
    first_move_families |>
      select(family_key, first_move_wave,
             pre_move_religious, baseline_log_giving),
    by = "family_key"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    event_time = wave - first_move_wave,
    change_from_pre_move = log_giving - baseline_log_giving,
    Religious = factor(
      pre_move_religious,
      levels = c(0, 1),
      labels = c("Not religious", "Religious")
    )
  ) |>
  filter(event_time %in% c(-4, -2, 0, 2, 4))

event_summary <- event_sample |>
  group_by(event_time, Religious) |>
  summarise(
    mean_change = weighted.mean(change_from_pre_move,
                                family_weight, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_families = n_distinct(family_key),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

n_event_families <- n_distinct(event_sample$family_key)

event_time_plot <- ggplot(
  event_summary,
  aes(x = event_time, y = mean_change,
      colour = Religious, group = Religious)
) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey60") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", colour = "grey50") +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("#7f8c8d", "#2980b9")) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(-4, -2, 0, 2, 4),
    labels = c("-4", "-2", "0", "+2", "+4")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Change in Giving Around the First Observed Move",
    subtitle = paste0(
      "One-time movers only; indexed to the prior wave (t = -2), ",
      "N = ", scales::comma(n_event_families), " families"
    ),
    x = "Years relative to move",
    y = "Change in log(giving + 1) relative to t = -2",
    colour = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

event_time_plot

ggsave(
  file.path(PLOT_DIR, "giving_event_time_first_move.png"),
  plot = event_time_plot,
  width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300
)
```

```{r plot_coefplot, fig.width=7, fig.height=4}
# ---- 7. Coefficient plot from the three models ----
coefplot(list("Baseline" = m1,
              "Interaction" = m2,
              "Controls" = m3),
         vcov = "cluster",
         keep = c("moved", "religious_lag",
                   "moved:religious_lag"),
         main = "Effect of Moving on log(Giving + 1)",
         sub  = "Family & wave FE, clustered SEs",
         ref.line = 0)

png(file.path(PLOT_DIR, "coefficient_plot.png"),
    width = 7, height = 4, units = "in", res = 300)
coefplot(list("Baseline" = m1,
              "Interaction" = m2,
              "Controls" = m3),
         vcov = "cluster",
         keep = c("moved", "religious_lag",
                  "moved:religious_lag"),
         main = "Effect of Moving on log(Giving + 1)",
         sub  = "Family & wave FE, clustered SEs",
         ref.line = 0)
dev.off()
```

```{r plot_trends, fig.width=9, fig.height=5}
# ---- 8. Weighted giving trends over time ----
trends <- analysis |>
  filter(!is.na(religious_lag), !is.na(moved)) |>
  mutate(
    group = case_when(
      moved == 0 & religious_lag == 1 ~ "Stayer, Religious",
      moved == 0 & religious_lag == 0 ~ "Stayer, Not religious",
      moved == 1 & religious_lag == 1 ~ "Mover, Religious",
      moved == 1 & religious_lag == 0 ~ "Mover, Not religious"
    )
  ) |>
  group_by(wave, group) |>
  summarise(
    mean_log_giving = weighted.mean(log_giving, family_weight,
                                    na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(trends, aes(x = wave, y = mean_log_giving,
                   colour = group, linetype = group)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +

  scale_colour_manual(values = c(
    "Stayer, Religious"     = "#2980b9",
    "Stayer, Not religious" = "#7f8c8d",
    "Mover, Religious"      = "#e74c3c",
    "Mover, Not religious"  = "#e67e22"
  )) +

  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(2001, 2021, 2)) +
  labs(
    title    = "Weighted Mean log(Giving + 1) Over Time",
    subtitle = "PSID 2003-2021 (weighted, lagged religiosity)",
    x = "Wave", y = "Weighted mean log(giving + 1)",
    colour = NULL, linetype = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

ggsave(file.path(PLOT_DIR, "giving_trends_by_group.png"),
       width = 9, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r plot_move_rate, fig.width=7, fig.height=4}
# ---- 9. Weighted moving rate over time by religiosity ----
move_rate <- analysis |>
  filter(!is.na(religious_lag), !is.na(moved)) |>
  mutate(Religious = factor(religious_lag, levels = c(0, 1),
                            labels = c("Not religious", "Religious"))) |>
  group_by(wave, Religious) |>
  summarise(
    pct_moved = 100 * weighted.mean(moved, family_weight),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(move_rate, aes(x = wave, y = pct_moved,
                      colour = Religious)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("#7f8c8d", "#2980b9")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(2001, 2021, 2)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  labs(
    title    = "Weighted Moving Rate Over Time by Pre-Move Religiosity",
    subtitle = "PSID 2003-2021 (weighted)",
    x = "Wave", y = "% who moved",
    colour = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

ggsave(file.path(PLOT_DIR, "move_rate_by_religiosity.png"),
       width = 7, height = 4, dpi = 300)
```
